steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to identify the title of Salinger's first published short story. Only one choice can accomplish that goal: the choice that actually states the title.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'In 1940, a short story by J.D. Salinger appeared in Story': Names the publication and year but omits the title entirely. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Salinger's first published work of fiction was a short story': Describes the genre of the work but gives no title. ✗
  • Choice C — 'J.D. Salinger's first published work of fiction appeared in 1940': States when it appeared but still does not name it. ✗
  • Choice D — 'J.D. Salinger's first published short story was called "The Young Folks"': Directly states the title "The Young Folks," which is exactly what the goal requires. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
